name: independent-reviewer
description: Carry out an independent review of all changes since last commit
author: piotr

hooks.command:
codex exec 'Check git status in this project (run: git status --short && git diff HEAD --stat). If any files were actually modified or created in this session, append one concise entry to planning/logs.md. Format strictly as: ## YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM - Brief title

- what changed or was implemented
- any decision made or open question resolved

If nothing changed (pure conversation, no file edits), do nothing and exit silently. Append only, never overwrite planning/logs.md.'
